x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Document templates (sn_doc_template) enable Now Assist HRSD to automate HR document generation workflows including offer letters, employment verification, and separation agreements. Without configured templates, Now Assist HRSD document automation is unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure document templates for key HR processes via sn_doc_template_list.do. Target: 5+ active templates. Now Assist HRSD can automate document generation from AI Agent workflows.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c56
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Document templates (sn_doc_template) enable Now Assist HRSD to automate HR document generation workflows including offer letters, employment verification, and separation agreements. Without configured templates, Now Assist HRSD document automation is unavailable.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR Document Management</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    if (!gs.tableExists('sn_doc_template')) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'sn_doc_template not found', finding: 'Document Templates (sn_doc) is not installed. HR document template check is not applicable.' };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_doc_template');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + ' active document templates';
    if (count >= 5) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + ' active document templates. Now Assist HRSD can leverage these for automated AI-driven document generation workflows.' };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue, finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active document template(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist HRSD document automation will have limited coverage.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue, finding: 'No active document templates configured. Now Assist HRSD document automation requires configured templates for AI-driven document generation workflows.' };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000400</number><order>80</order><remediation_guidance>Configure document templates for key HR processes via sn_doc_template_list.do. Target: 5+ active templates. Now Assist HRSD can automate document generation from AI Agent workflows.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c56</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR Document Management</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_07f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c56</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
